---
applyTo: 'src/**/ui/**/*.astro'
---

# UI segment

Follow [AGENTS.md](../../AGENTS.md).

- Type props, use semantic HTML and preserve keyboard, theme and reduced-motion behavior.
- Prefer existing tokens and shared UI primitives over new one-off styling systems.
- Put reusable behavior in the owning model or lib segment and add browser regressions for interactions.
